name: Shamanic journey drum: the frame drum used to enter trance states, its steady beat carrying the shaman to the lower, middle, or upper worlds. FSPLIT: the drumbeat splits the shaman's consciousness — the body remains in the ritual space while the soul travels to the spirit realm. FFUSE: the callback beat (a distinct rhythm shift) reconstitutes the shaman — soul returns to body with the healing, vision, or power animal. VINIT: silence before the first drumbeat. TANCH: the drum's rim — the boundary circle. AFWD: the beat that propels the soul outward. AREV: the callback beat that draws the soul home. ENGAGR: the shaman is simultaneously in the ritual tent (observers see the body) and in the spirit world (the soul acts there).

phase_0.domain_name: Shamanic journey drum: the frame drum used to enter trance states, its steady beat carrying the shaman to the lower, middle, or upper worlds. FSPLIT: the drumbeat splits the shaman's consciousness — the body remains in the ritual space while the soul travels to the spirit realm. FFUSE: the callback beat (a distinct rhythm shift) reconstitutes the shaman — soul returns to body with the healing, vision, or power animal. VINIT: silence before the first drumbeat. TANCH: the drum's rim — the boundary circle. AFWD: the beat that propels the soul outward. AREV: the callback beat that draws the soul home. ENGAGR: the shaman is simultaneously in the ritual tent (observers see the body) and in the spirit world (the soul acts there).
phase_0.boundary_condition: the drum's rim — the circle that contains the ritual space and separates it from the mundane world

VINIT.justification: the void of unmanifest potential, no rhythm, no journey yet

TANCH.justification: the fixed boundary that defines the ritual circle and contains the beat

AFWD.justification: the steady drumbeat that carries the shaman's soul upward or outward to the spirit realm

AREV.justification: a distinct rhythm shift that draws the soul back home to the body

CLINK.chosen_element: the sequence of beats forming a journey pattern
CLINK.justification: composition of forward and callback beats into a coherent trance arc

IMSCRIB.justification: the internal pulse that recognizes itself as the anchor of identity throughout the journey

FSPLIT.justification: the steady beat separates the shaman into body (in ritual space) and soul (traveling to spirit realm)

FFUSE.chosen_element: the callback beat reconstitutes the shaman
FFUSE.justification: the distinct rhythm shift reunites soul and body, restoring the unified shaman with the vision

EVALT.justification: the shaman returns with a healing, vision, or power animal — affirmative outcome

EVALF.chosen_element: failed journey — soul lost or no vision
EVALF.justification: the callback beat fails, soul does not return, or no message is received — negative outcome

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the shaman is simultaneously in the ritual tent and in the spirit world
ENGAGR.justification: observers see the body drumming, but the soul acts in the lower, middle, or upper world — both states true at once

IFIX.chosen_element: the drum's rhythm pattern recorded in memory
IFIX.justification: the specific beat sequence for a journey is fixed and repeatable, an irreversible record of the trance path

phase_2.split_input: the unified shaman (body+soul) before the journey
phase_2.fuse_element: the callback beat reconstitutes the shaman
phase_2.fuse_result: the unified shaman (body+soul) after the journey, carrying the vision

phase_3.void_description: silence before the first drumbeat — no rhythm, no journey, no separation
phase_3.true_description: successful journey — soul returns with vision, body intact
phase_3.false_description: failed journey — soul lost or no vision, callback fails
phase_3.both_description: shaman simultaneously in ritual tent and spirit world — body observed, soul acting elsewhere

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the shaman sits with the drum, feeling their own heartbeat — self-recognition as the journeyer
Step 2 AREV: the shaman takes a deep breath, descending into a relaxed state — descent into trance readiness
Step 3 FSPLIT: the first steady drumbeat splits consciousness — body stays, soul begins to travel
Step 4 AFWD: the beat propels the soul outward to the lower, middle, or upper world — ascent/forward movement
Step 5 FFUSE: the callback beat sounds, soul returns to body — fusion restores the unified shaman
Step 6 CLINK: the journey pattern is composed — forward beats and callback beats linked into a coherent sequence
Step 7 IFIX: the rhythm pattern is recorded in memory or drum notation — fixed for future journeys
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the shaman opens their eyes, recognizes themselves again — identity restored at journey's end

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the shaman's intention and training — translates the desire to journey into specific drumming patterns
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the drumbeat itself — the vibration carries the soul's communication between body and spirit realm
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the shaman's body memory and drum — stores the rhythm patterns and journey experiences
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the steady tempo of the drum — determines the timing of beats and the duration of the journey
phase_5.alfs_store: the ancestral drumming tradition — the canonical patterns passed down through generations

phase_6.cycle_cost: the shaman's energy and focus — each beat consumes physical and mental effort
phase_6.post_cycle_state: silence, unified shaman with vision, journey completed
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the system returns to a unified state (shaman whole) with the same total energy, only the information (vision) is added, no net disorder
